# Task Brief Template

Copy this file into `docs/tasks/YYYY-MM-DD-short-task-name.md` and replace the placeholders.

## Title

`[Short task title]`

## Why this matters

Explain the user, business, or engineering reason this work matters.

## Desired outcome

Describe the observable result we want.

## Scope

In scope:

- `[item]`
- `[item]`

Out of scope:

- `[item]`
- `[item]`

## Constraints

- `[technical or product constraint]`
- `[risk or compatibility constraint]`

## Acceptance criteria

- `[observable behavior]`
- `[validation expectation]`

## Risk level

- Low / Medium / High

## Requires explicit human approval before implementation?

- Yes / No

If yes, specify why.

## Relevant files or docs

- `AGENTS.md`
- `ARCHITECTURE.md`
- `[path]`
- `[path]`

## Notes for Codex

State whether you want:

- exploration only
- an execution plan
- direct implementation
